cardPlayed.name: Fight or Flight
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move a unit from a battlefield to its base.

cardPlayed.name: Flurry of Blades
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Deal 1 to all units at battlefields.

cardPlayed.name: Defy
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter a spell that costs no more than :rb_energy_4: and no more than :rb_rune_rainbow:.

cardPlayed.name: Consult the Past
cardPlayed.text: HIDDEN (Hide now for [rune] to react with later for [0].) REACTION (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.) Draw 2.

cardPlayed.name: Emperor's Divide
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move any number of friendly units at a battlefield to their base.

cardPlayed.name: Switcheroo
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action]_ (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)_
Swap the Might of two units at the same battlefield this turn.

cardPlayed.name: Arise!
cardPlayed.text: Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token for each Equipment you control. Then ready two of them.

cardPlayed.name: Singularity
cardPlayed.text: Deal 6 to each of up to two units.

cardPlayed.name: Promising Future
cardPlayed.text: Each player looks at the top 5 cards of their Main Deck, chooses one, then recycles the rest. Starting with the next player, each player plays those cards, ignoring Energy costs. (They must still pay Power costs.).

cardPlayed.name: Cannon Barrage
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Deal 2 to all enemy units in combat.

cardPlayed.name: Reinforce
cardPlayed.text: Look at the top 5 cards of your Main Deck. You may play a unit from among them. Its Energy cost is reduced by :rb_energy_5:. Then recycle the remaining cards.

cardPlayed.name: Desert's Call
cardPlayed.text:
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token.

cardPlayed.name: Arcane Shift
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Banish a friendly unit, then its owner plays it, ignoring its cost. Deal 3 to an enemy unit at a battlefield. Banish this.

cardPlayed.name: Find Your Center
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
If an opponent's score is within 3 points of the Victory Score, this costs :rb_energy_2: less.
Draw 1 and channel 1 rune exhausted.

cardPlayed.name: Invert Timelines
cardPlayed.text: Each player discards their hand, then draws 4.

cardPlayed.name: Party Favors
cardPlayed.text: Each other player chooses Cards or Runes. For each player that chooses Cards, you and that player each draw 1. For each player that chooses Runes, you and that player each channel 1 rune exhausted.

cardPlayed.name: Wind Wall
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter a spell.

cardPlayed.name: Reinforce
cardPlayed.text: Look at the top 5 cards of your Main Deck. You may play a unit from among them. Its Energy cost is reduced by :rb_energy_5:. Then recycle the remaining cards.

cardPlayed.name: Guards!
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden]_ (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)_
Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token. You may pay :rb_rune_order: to ready it.

cardPlayed.name: Rocket Barrage
cardPlayed.text:
[Repeat] :rb_energy_4::rb_rune_mind: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect, and may make different choices.)
Choose one —

  • Deal 4 to a unit in a base.

  • Kill a gear.

.

cardPlayed.name: Bonds of Strength
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Give two friendly units each +1 :rb_might: this turn.

cardPlayed.name: Production Surge
cardPlayed.text:
This costs :rb_energy_2: less if you control a Mech.
Play a 3 :rb_might: Mech unit token to your base.
Draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Void Seeker
cardPlayed.text: ACTION (Play on your turn or in showdowns.) Deal 4 to a unit at a battlefield. Draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Highlander
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Choose a friendly unit. The next time it dies this turn, recall it exhausted instead. (Send it to base. This isn't a move.).

cardPlayed.name: En Garde
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a friendly unit +1 :rb_might: this turn, then an additional +1 :rb_might: this turn if it is the only unit you control there.

cardPlayed.name: Vengeance
cardPlayed.text: Kill a unit.

cardPlayed.name: Mobilize
cardPlayed.text: Channel 1 rune exhausted. If you can't, draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Noxian Guillotine
cardPlayed.text:
[Action]_ (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)_
Choose a unit. Kill it the next time it takes damage this turn.
[Legion] — Kill it now instead. (Get the effect if you've played another card this turn.).

cardPlayed.text: Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token for each Equipment you control. Then ready two of them.

[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Choose a unit. The next time that unit would be dealt damage this turn, prevent it. Draw 1.
